prose.en: Obtain software and data employed during system component and service refreshes from the following trusted sources: {param:si-14.01_odp}.

guidance.en: Trusted sources include software and data from write-once, read-only media or from selected offline secure storage facilities.

prose.en: the software and data employed during system component and service refreshes are obtained from {param:si-14.01_odp}.

objects.en: procedures addressing non-persistence for system components
system configuration settings and associated documentation
Organizational personnel responsible for obtaining component and service refreshes from trusted sources
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Organizational processes for defining and obtaining component and service refreshes from trusted sources
automated mechanisms supporting and/or implementing component and service refreshes

guidelines.en: trusted sources to obtain software and data for system component and service refreshes are defined;
